label: Functional Gap Analysis
description: Produced optimization candidates to improve functional goal

defaultOutputs.name: Functional Axis
defaultOutputs.description: Defined biological process or mechanistic pathway associated with the selected functional objective

defaultOutputs.name: Current Formula (Honey 10 g) – Active Drivers
defaultOutputs.description: Identified compounds within the evaluated formula that demonstrate mechanistic alignment with the specified functional axis.

defaultOutputs.name: Coverage Strength
defaultOutputs.description: Qualitative assessment of how strongly the current formula engages the specified functional axis, based on pathway alignment, exposure plausibility, and compound diversity.

defaultOutputs.name: Gap Identified
defaultOutputs.description: Indicates whether the functional axis is underrepresented relative to the defined functional network model.

defaultOutputs.name: Suggested Ingredient
defaultOutputs.description: Candidate ingredient recommended to improve coverage of the identified gap, based on compound–target–pathway mapping and complementarity analysis.

defaultOutputs.name: Key Active Compound(s)
defaultOutputs.description: Bioactive or nutrient constituents within the suggested ingredient that contribute to engagement of the specified functional axis.

defaultOutputs.name: Mechanistic Rationale
defaultOutputs.description: Explanation of how the suggested ingredient’s active compounds are predicted to enhance pathway engagement or complement existing network coverage.

defaultOutputs.name: Expected Optimization Impact
defaultOutputs.description: Predicted qualitative improvement in functional network balance or pathway coverage following integration of the suggested ingredient.
